name: bsdata-parser
description: Faithful BSData .gst/.cat XML parser: parses game-data source files into a typed IR and exposes a golden-diff harness for validating a downstream projection.

scripts.prepublishOnly: git diff --quiet HEAD -- src/project/catalogue.ts || (echo 'ERROR: catalogue.ts has local changes (skip-worktree). Publish via the CI publish workflow on a version tag, not locally.' && exit 1)
